title: crataegus odoratissima
intro: Crataegus odoratissima, also known as the fragrant hawthorn or Crataegus, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Rosaceae. The medicinal properties of Crataegus odoratissima are attributed to its leaves, flowers, and fruits, which contain flavonoids, organic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and improve lipid profiles, making it a popular herbal remedy for heart-related issues. Crataegus odoratissima can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
